suite.name: suite S1779533200208 1

kw.name: Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

test.name: TC_001 Successful Login With Valid Credentials

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'You logged into a secure area!'.
kw.arg: You logged into a secure area!
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Vérifier que l'utilisateur peut se connecter avec les identifiants valides

test.name: TC_002 Failed Login With Invalid Password

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Password Error Message
Verify Invalid Password Error Displayed
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.msg: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash'][contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.
kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash'][contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash'][contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.
Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash'][contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Vérifier que la connexion échoue avec un password incorrect
test.status: Element 'xpath=//div[@id='flash'][contains(text(), 'Your password is invalid!')]' did not appear in 5 seconds.

test.name: TC_003 Failed Login With Invalid Username

kw.name: Go To
kw.doc: Navigates the current browser window to the provided ``url``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Input Text
kw.doc: Types the given ``text`` into the text field identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Click Button
kw.doc: Clicks the button identified by ``locator``.

kw.name: Verify Username Error Message
Wait Until Page Contains Element
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` appears on the current page.

kw.name: Page Should Contain
kw.msg: Current page contains text 'Your username is invalid!'.
kw.doc: Verifies that current page contains ``text``.

kw.name: Verify Login Page Displayed
Location Should Be
kw.msg: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login'.
kw.doc: Verifies that the current URL is exactly ``url``.
kw.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login'.
Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login'.
Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login'.

kw.name: Capture Page Screenshot
kw.doc: Takes a screenshot of the current page and embeds it into a log file.

test.doc: Vérifier que la connexion échoue avec un username incorrect
test.status: Location should have been 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login/login' but was 'https://the-internet.herokuapp.com/login'.

kw.name: Close Browser
kw.doc: Closes the current browser.

suite.doc: Tests pour la fonctionnalité de connexion
